section.heading: Officer or employee contracting with Member of Congress

content.p: Whoever, being an officer or employee of the United States, on behalf of the United States or any agency thereof, directly or indirectly makes or enters into any contract, bargain, or agreement, with any Member of or Delegate to Congress, or any Resident Commissioner, either before or after he has qualified, shall be fined under this title.

note.heading: Historical and Revision Notes
note.p: Words “agency” and “employee” were inserted to eliminate any ambiguity as to scope of section. (See definition of agency under section 6 of this title.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1994—Pub. L. 103–322 substituted “fined under this title” for “fined not more than $3,000”.
